runtime.package:electron: node scripts/build-scripts/bake-electron-config-script.mjs && cd main/electron && npx electron-builder --win --linux && cd ../.. && node scripts/build-scripts/move-electron-dist-script.mjs && node scripts/build-scripts/provide-electron-installer-script.mjs

build.build: npm run sync:web-routes && npm run sync:db-semantics && npm run sync:table-caveats && npm run sync:static-icons && tsc -p main/discord/tsconfig.json && tsc -p main/server/tsconfig.json && tsc -p main/dashboard/tsconfig.json && vite build --config main/dashboard/vite.config.ts && npm run verify:fonts

verify.verify: npm run lint:fix && npm run verify:prompts && npm run build
verify.verify:css: npm run format && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:css:scopes
verify.verify:css:fix: npm run format && npm run lint:css:fix && npm run lint:css:scopes

lint.lint: npm run format && eslint --config shared/config/eslint.discord.config.js "main/discord/src/**/*.ts" && eslint --config shared/config/eslint.dashboard.config.js "main/dashboard/src/**/*.ts" && eslint --config shared/config/eslint.server.config.js "main/server/src/**/*.ts" && npm run verify:css && npm run lint:dup && npm run lint:sql
lint.lint:fix: npm run sync:tokens && npm run format && eslint --fix --config shared/config/eslint.discord.config.js "main/discord/src/**/*.ts" && eslint --fix --config shared/config/eslint.dashboard.config.js "main/dashboard/src/**/*.ts" && eslint --fix --config shared/config/eslint.server.config.js "main/server/src/**/*.ts" && npm run verify:css:fix && npm run lint:dup && npm run lint:sql:fix
lint.lint:sql: python -m sqlfluff lint --config shared/config/.sqlfluff main/server/src/database/schemas && node scripts/audit/audit-schema-doctrine-script.mjs
lint.lint:sql:fix: python -m sqlfluff fix --config shared/config/.sqlfluff main/server/src/database/schemas && python -m sqlfluff lint --config shared/config/.sqlfluff main/server/src/database/schemas && node scripts/audit/audit-schema-doctrine-script.mjs

assets.map-pipeline:tiles: npm run map-tiles:optimize && npm run map:db && npm run map-stitch:tiles && npm run map-merge:tiles && npm run map-manifest:tiles
